prompt: A stylized anime poster of three handsome high school boys wearing white button-up school shirts and black shoulder bags, arranged across a single urban street scene like a music-player cover. The composition shows exactly 3 figures: one on the left in side profile facing left with his eyes obscured by a black censor bar, one in the center turning back toward the viewer with a black backpack and a direct calm gaze, and one on the right in side profile facing right with his chin tilted up. All three have short messy black hair, dark silhouette-like faces and bodies with thin white line details, and small wired earphones in their ears. The setting is a bright suburban school-route street under a pale blue sky, with utility poles and overhead cables, a green roadside sign reading SCHOOL ROUTE, fences and trees on the left, and a light green school building on the right. Use a cool pastel palette of sky blue, mint green, pale teal, black, white, and orange accents. Overlay the scene with futuristic graphic-design UI elements: black border panels, dots, stripes, small crosses, playback icons, grid fragments, and decorative techno shapes around all edges. At the top left include a digital timer reading 00:00:00. At the bottom, add a large bold italic techno title reading now plyaing, intentionally misspelled, stretched across a wide mint-green-and-orange arrow banner with a small play icon beneath it. Give the whole image the look of a sleek lo-fi music visual, anime street fashion poster, and futuristic album-cover graphic, with crisp line art, flat shaded silhouettes, layered transparency effects on the shirts, and a clean high-contrast layout in a 4:3 format.
